view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that multiple customers can book the same offer, and their payment statuses are tracked individually. For instance, the evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step shows a confirmed booking with a specific customer, while the 'customer-two-concurrent' step demonstrates another confirmed booking for a different customer. This indicates that the system maintains separate payment statuses for each participant in a shared booking, fulfilling the requirement.
